title: mentha longifolia var. lepidioides
intro: Mentha longifolia var. lepidioides, also known as Woolly Mint, is a perennial plant species in the Lamiaceae family that is native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its various health benefits. The plant is traditionally used to alleviate digestive issues, reduce stress, and promote respiratory health, making it a popular herbal remedy in many cultures. In herbal preparations, Woolly Mint is often used in teas, essential oils, and infusions to harness its therapeutic properties.
